query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as qtd_vendas,
  SUM(saleValue) as valor_total,
  AVG(saleValue) as ticket_medio,
  SUM(totalCommission) as comissao_total,
  AVG(totalCommission) as comissao_media
FROM sales
WHERE YEAR(saleDate) = 2026 AND MONTH(saleDate) = 1;
